## Project Details
- **Type**: Next.js web application
- **Language**: TypeScript
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS
- **Router**: App Router
- **Purpose**: Jazz music discovery, recommendations, and audio streaming

## Features to Implement
- Jazz music catalog and search
- Personalized recommendations
- Real-time audio playback
- User authentication
- Watchlist management
